steps.objective: Understand the main problem and contribution
questions_to_answer: What is the main problem addressed in the paper?
steps.expected_output: Understand the main research question and the proposed approach
Understand the context and motivation of the research

steps.objective: Get an overview of the paper structure and main findings
questions_to_answer: What are the main sections of the paper?
steps.expected_output: Understand the paper structure and main conclusions

questions_to_answer: What are the main components of the proposed model?

steps.objective: Understand the encoder and decoder stacks and attention mechanism
questions_to_answer: How do the encoder and decoder stacks work?
What is the role of attention in the model?
steps.expected_output: Understand the encoder, decoder, and attention mechanism

steps.objective: Understand the training process and evaluation results
questions_to_answer: What are the main evaluation results?
steps.expected_output: Understand the training process and main evaluation results

questions_to_answer: How does scaled dot-product attention work?
steps.expected_output: Understand the attention mechanisms in detail

questions_to_answer: What are the benefits of self-attention?

steps.objective: Analyze the evaluation results and model variations
questions_to_answer: What are the main evaluation results?
How do different model variations perform?
steps.expected_output: Understand the evaluation results and model variations in detail

final_user_task.summary_task: Summarize the main contributions and findings of the paper
reflection_questions: What are the main contributions of the paper?
What are the implications of the research?
What are the potential limitations and future work directions?
